context: Live E2E verification of the newer tools, run after swapping the registered live server (target/rmcp1/aseprite_mcp.exe) for the current build (163 cargo tests pass) and reconnecting. Aseprite 1.3.17.2 / plugin 0.3.2. The old build is backed up as target/rmcp1/aseprite_mcp.exe.approved-bak.
method: On a known 6-colour 32x32 sprite (and dedicated sprites for import/autotile), each tool was exercised and its output checked for palette-legality (no colour outside the source set) via a Python colour-scan of the nearest-neighbour preview, plus the tool's own summary.

live_rotate.detail: 33 deg onto a new layer, 264 px, distinct_colors=5 (<=6 source). No AA fringe; palette-legal by construction.

live_dither_fill.detail: bayer4 between #2e7d32/#4ca02c, 128 px; only the two colours emitted.

live_gradient_map.detail: mapped the rotated blob onto a 4-step ramp; mappedColors=3, output within ramp.

palette_legality_combined.detail: Composite of rotate+dither+gradient = 5 distinct colours, ZERO outside the 6-colour source palette.

live_extract_style_profile.detail: grid native 32x32 scale 1; ramp [1b4d3e,2e7d32,4ca02c,6abe30] lint 0.85; light_dir top-left (matches drawn highlight); heads_tall 6.5; outline_policy selective.

crop_cel.detail: crop:'cel' executes and reads the cel bbox, but drawn cels are full-canvas so it returned crop {0,0} 32x32 == sprite-crop. Matches the documented caveat; use explicit-rect crop to focus on drawn content.

live_import_reference_regrid.detail: Imported a 48x48 that is really 12x12x4 with regrid:true -> detected_scale 4, recovered native 12x12, 144 px, 5 colours preserved.

live_import_reference_auto_colors.detail: auto_colors:5 (frequency) extracted EXACTLY the 5 source colours [#1a1626,#d8202e,#2e7d32,#6abe30,#e8e0d0].

live_create_autotile_template_blob47.detail: Drew 4 quarters [fill|outer|edge|inner] tile_size 8 -> 47 tiles in a 7x7 sheet, 3008 px, palette-legal (terrain+outline only).

live_create_autotile_template_wang16.detail: Same quarters -> 16 edge-only tiles in a 4x4 sheet, 1024 px, palette-legal.

live_pack_similar_tiles_over_blob47.detail: Packed the 47-tile sheet: 144 cells -> 47 UNIQUE tiles (all distinct, no dupes) + tilemap layer.

verdict: All newer tools live-verified end-to-end: rotate / dither / gradient (palette-legal by construction), extract_style_profile, import regrid + auto_colors, autotile_template blob47 + wang16, pack_similar_tiles. crop:'cel' verified as documented (full-canvas for drawn cels). Zero off-palette pixels anywhere.
